nasb.text: “For the mountains I will take up a weeping and wailing, And for the pastures of the wilderness a dirge, Because they are laid waste so that no one passes through, And the lowing of the cattle is not heard; Both the birds of the sky and the beasts have fled; they are gone.

esv.text: “I will take up weeping and wailing for the mountains, and a lamentation for the pastures of the wilderness, because they are laid waste so that no one passes through, and the lowing of cattle is not heard; both the birds of the air and the beasts have fled and are gone.

cnv.text: 我要為眾山哭泣哀號， 為曠野的草場唱哀歌； 因為都已成為荒涼，無人經過， 也聽不到牲畜的叫聲； 無論空中的飛鳥，地上的走獸， 都逃走跑掉了。

ccb.text: 我要为众山悲伤痛哭， 为旷野的草原唱哀歌， 因为那里一片荒凉，杳无人迹， 听不见牲畜的叫声， 飞鸟和走兽也逃去无踪。
